goal: code-smell-sweep-9be8: Sweep review of the project, identify code smells, and fix them; every spawned role uses model composer-2.5. Read `.orchestrate/code-smell-sweep-9be8/discovery/CODE-SMELL-AUDIT.md` and `bootstrap/PATHS_AND_VERIFICATION.md` before editing product code. Respect `AGENTS.md`. Do not revert sibling agents' work.
summary: Parallel code-smell fixes: typed mutation/DnD hooks, project-modal error surfacing, aiTaskAssistPanel dedup, useAgent thread-persist extraction, and BE vector-augment dedup — then merge.
acceptanceCriteria: Each implementation worker fixes its scoped smell with tests where feasible; eslint + tsc green on touched slices.
Each verifier records unit-test-verified or a concrete blocker.
Merge worker produces `orch/code-smell-sweep-9be8/merge-code-smell-sweep` with full Jest + tsc + eslint + vite build green.

tasks.name: fix-use-react-mutation-types
tasks.scopedGoal: Remove `any` from `useReactMutation` optimistic callback typing (audit id mutation-callback-any).
tasks.brief:
Read `.orchestrate/code-smell-sweep-9be8/discovery/CODE-SMELL-AUDIT.md`.

Replace the `callback?: (...args: any) => any` parameter in `src/utils/hooks/useReactMutation.ts` with a typed signature such as `(target: unknown, old?: unknown) => unknown | undefined`. Remove eslint-disable for explicit-any on that line. Update call sites only if TypeScript surfaces real mismatches — behavior must stay identical (rollback on undefined/same reference).

Add or extend a focused test in `useReactMutation.test.ts` if one exists, or a minimal test file proving optimistic rollback still works.
acceptance: Existing mutation consumers compile without new eslint disables.
tasks.verify:
## Automated
- `CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand src/utils/hooks/useReactMutation`
- `npm run eslint -- --max-warnings 0 src/utils/hooks/useReactMutation.ts`
- `npx tsc --noEmit`

tasks.name: verify-fix-use-react-mutation-types
tasks.brief: Re-run verify recipe on worker branch. Confirm `any` is gone from callback typing and tests pass.

tasks.name: fix-dnd-clone-types
tasks.scopedGoal: Tighten `dragAndDrop` cloneElement typing; remove `as any` where possible (audit id dnd-clone-element-any).
tasks.brief:
Read the discovery audit. In `src/components/dragAndDrop/index.tsx`, replace `RefAttributes<unknown> | any` and `base as any` with a narrow child prop type or `React.ReactElement` constraint. Keep runtime behavior identical — existing `index.test.tsx` and column DnD tests must pass.

Do not change `disableInteractiveElementBlocking` usage on board/column — out of scope.
acceptance: No `@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any` disable for cloneElement props unless unavoidable with a one-line rationale.
tasks.verify:
## Automated
- `CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand src/components/dragAndDrop`
- `npm run eslint -- --max-warnings 0 src/components/dragAndDrop`
- `npx tsc --noEmit`

tasks.name: verify-fix-dnd-clone-types
tasks.brief: Re-run verify recipe; confirm tests pass and `any` usage reduced.

tasks.name: fix-project-modal-errors
tasks.scopedGoal: Stop swallowing project create/edit mutation failures (audit id project-modal-swallowed-error).
tasks.brief:
In `src/components/projectModal/index.tsx`, replace `mutateAsync(payload).then(onClose).catch(() => {})` with error handling that surfaces failures to the user (AntD `message.error` with `getError` / microcopy, or inline form error — match patterns from `taskModal` or other modals). Only call `onClose` on success.

Add/extend tests in `src/components/projectModal/index.test.tsx` asserting a failed mutation does not close the modal and shows feedback.
acceptance: Failed mutation leaves modal open with user-visible error.
tasks.verify:
## Automated
- `CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand src/components/projectModal`
- `npm run eslint -- --max-warnings 0 src/components/projectModal`
- `npx tsc --noEmit`

tasks.name: verify-fix-project-modal-errors
tasks.brief: Re-run verify recipe; confirm failure test and no empty catch.

tasks.name: fix-ai-task-assist-smells
tasks.scopedGoal: Dedup local AI context, surface local-engine errors, hoist magic delay constants in aiTaskAssistPanel.
tasks.brief:
Read discovery audit ids ai-assist-dup-context, ai-assist-swallowed-catch, ai-assist-magic-delays.

In `src/components/aiTaskAssistPanel/index.tsx`:
1. Extract `buildLocalAiContext(projectId, columns, tasks, members)` (module-level or `aiTaskAssistContext.ts` co-located) replacing three duplicate payload blocks.
2. Replace `.catch(() => undefined)` on `runEstimate`/`runReadiness`/regenerate with routing to existing `estimateError`/`readinessError` or equivalent — no silent failures.
3. Hoist `1000` debounce and `250` delayed-flag ms to named constants at module top.
4. Reduce `(microcopy… as string)` casts where a small `asMicrocopyString()` helper or typed key path fixes them without widening types globally.

Preserve dual `useAi`/`useAgent` unconditional mount. Do not change hook APIs. Extend `agent.test.tsx` or component tests for error visibility if feasible.
acceptance: Single helper builds local-engine context payloads.
tasks.verify:
## Automated
- `CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand src/components/aiTaskAssistPanel`
- `npm run eslint -- --max-warnings 0 src/components/aiTaskAssistPanel`
- `npx tsc --noEmit`

tasks.name: verify-fix-ai-task-assist-smells
tasks.brief: Re-run verify recipe; grep for empty catch on estimate/readiness paths.

tasks.name: extract-use-agent-thread-persist
tasks.scopedGoal: Extract thread persistence helpers from useAgent.ts into useAgentThreadPersist.ts without API changes.
tasks.brief:
Read discovery id use-agent-thread-persist.

Move `threadStorageKey`, `readPersistedThread`, `writePersistedThread`, and related safe-storage helpers from `src/utils/hooks/useAgent.ts` into `src/utils/hooks/useAgentThreadPersist.ts`. Re-export any symbols tests import from `useAgent.ts` if needed. Default export `useAgent` behavior unchanged.

Add `useAgentThreadPersist.test.ts` covering read/write round-trip with mocked localStorage.

Do not change stream consumer, tool resolver, or nudge inbox — those are separate modules already.
acceptance: All `useAgent.test.tsx` tests pass unchanged in behavior.
New unit test covers persistence helpers.
tasks.verify:
## Automated
- `CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand src/utils/hooks/useAgent src/utils/hooks/useAgentThreadPersist`
- `npm run eslint -- --max-warnings 0 src/utils/hooks/useAgent.ts src/utils/hooks/useAgentThreadPersist.ts`
- `npx tsc --noEmit`

tasks.name: verify-extract-use-agent-thread-persist
tasks.brief: Re-run verify recipe; confirm useAgent public API unchanged.

tasks.name: be-catalog-vector-dedup
tasks.scopedGoal: Deduplicate pgvector augmentation between task_estimation and search catalog agents (audit id be-cat-dup-vec).
tasks.brief:
Read discovery audit. Extract shared async helper in `backend/app/agents/catalog/_shared.py` for the repeated pattern: settings gate, `embed_async`, `fetch_vector_neighbours_for_project`, `merge_similar_with_vector_hits`, warning log on failure. Update `task_estimation.py` and `search.py` call sites. Narrow `except Exception` to documented BLE001 only where intentional.

Run `python -m pytest tests/test_vector_augmented_agents.py` and related tests.
acceptance: Vector augment logic lives in one shared helper.
task_estimation and search behavior unchanged per tests.
ruff check passes on touched files.
tasks.verify:
## Automated
- `cd backend && python -m pytest tests/test_vector_augmented_agents.py -q`
- `cd backend && ruff check app/agents/catalog/_shared.py app/agents/catalog/task_estimation.py app/agents/catalog/search.py`

tasks.name: verify-be-catalog-vector-dedup
tasks.brief: Re-run pytest + ruff on worker branch.

tasks.name: merge-code-smell-sweep
tasks.scopedGoal: Merge six worker branches into orch/code-smell-sweep-9be8/merge-code-smell-sweep; full FE verification; no PR.
tasks.brief:
Merge order (git merge --no-ff):
1. fix-use-react-mutation-types
2. fix-dnd-clone-types
3. fix-project-modal-errors
4. fix-ai-task-assist-smells
5. extract-use-agent-thread-persist
6. be-catalog-vector-dedup

Conflict policy: union code changes; for useAgent.ts + useAgentThreadPersist.ts prefer extract branch. Run full verification from bootstrap/PATHS_AND_VERIFICATION.md plus `npx vite build` and `cd backend && python -m pytest -q` on merged tree.
acceptance: tsc, eslint, full Jest, vite build, backend pytest green.
tasks.verify:
## Automated
- `npx tsc --noEmit`
- `npm run eslint -- --max-warnings 0`
- `CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand`
- `npx vite build`
- `cd backend && python -m pytest -q`
